description: Lead-mode discipline for /relay:mode sessions: (1) PreToolUse gate blocks large inline Edit/Write/MultiEdit so work gets delegated; (2) Stop hook wakes the idle lead when an executor reports or the lead made commits this turn, announcing them and waiting for the user (never auto-acts). Silent on non-lead and executor sessions (each hook fast-exits when the lead marker is absent). SessionEnd cleans up lead state.

hooks.rewakeMessage: 🚦 [relay] — review needed: an executor finished or you committed work while idle. Open your reply with the marker '🚦 [relay] — review needed:', surface the details below to the user, and wait for their direction — do not auto-review or auto-commit:
hooks.rewakeSummary: 🚦 [relay] — an executor finished while you were idle (details next)
